title: Rathi Hospital
heading: Welcome To Rathi Hospital
text:
Rathi Hospital Home About Us Doctors Departments Services Contact Us Branches Appointment Rathi Hospital was established in 1980 by Dr. S D Rathi in Sultanpuri, New Delhi with a dream of providing expert healthcare with compassion. With his sheer dedication, hardwork and expertise, it soon became the centre of excellence in health services of the region. Appointment Contact Us About Us World Class Patient Facilities Designed for You Rathi Hospital has been a trusted name in healthcare since its inception in 1980 . Founded by Dr. S.D. Rathi in Sultanpuri, New Delhi , the hospital was envisioned as a center where expert healthcare would be accessible, affordable, and compassionate for all sections of society. Driven by sheer dedication, hard work, and unmatched expertise, Dr. Rathi laid a strong foundation for what soon became a leading institution in the healthcare landscape of the region. And our achievements Ankit Verma Noida I rushed my friend to Rathi Hospital during a late-night emergency. The team acted quickly and saved her life. Their prompt and professional response was remarkable. Shalini Mehta New Delhi Taking my 5-year-old for treatment was always a challenge until we found Rathi Hospital. The pediatricians here are amazing, and the environment is very child-friendly. My daughter is no longer scared of hospital visits! Arjun Singh Gurugram Rathi Hospital has top-notch facilities that make you feel safe and in capable hands. From diagnostics to treatment, everything is seamlessly managed. I highly recommend this hospital for quality healthcare. Rohit Sharma Gurugram I visited Rathi Hospital for a critical health issue, and the doctors were absolutely professional. The diagnosis was accurate, and the treatment plan worked wonders. I feel healthier and stronger today because of them. How We Work Real Patients, Real Stories. And our achievements Book an Appointment Conduct Checkup Perform Treatment Prescribe & Payment Appointment 1000 + Heart Surgeries 540000 + Happy Patients Your Trusted Health Partner Since 1980 Your Name Phone Number Request a CallBack Frequently Asked Questions To make your experience smoother, we’ve compiled a list of commonly asked questions to help you get quick answers about appointments, medical services, timings, and more. Are there specialist doctors available? Absolutely! We have a team of highly experienced specialists in fields like cardiology, orthopedics, pediatrics, gynecology, and more. Does the hospital offer cashless insurance facilities? Yes, Rathi Hospital is empaneled with several leading insurance providers to offer seamless cashless hospitalization services What are the hospital's operating hours? Our outpatient department (OPD) operates from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM, while emergency services are available 24/7. Where is Rathi Hospital located? Rathi hospital is conveniently located on the Nangloi-Najafgarh road, next to the Kali Mata Mandir. The nearest metro station is Nangloi metro station. Contact us? +91 9871173355 Appointment Certificate Our comprehensive diagnostics, technology-aided consultations with eminent doctors and quality healthcare at affordable cost are some of the many reasons Rathi Hospital is every patient's first choice.
